title: Minor emancipated by marriage; nursing care benefits
doc_html:
§445.  Minor emancipated by marriage; nursing care benefits

A minor emancipated by marriage shall not be ineligible, by reason of age alone, to apply for and receive nursing care benefits.  

Added by Acts 1970, No. 347, §1.
doc_text:
§445.  Minor emancipated by marriage; nursing care benefits
A minor emancipated by marriage shall not be ineligible, by reason of age alone, to apply for and receive nursing care benefits.
Added by Acts 1970, No. 347, §1.
